name: Linton Risewell ~ Guts and Blackpowder
description:
Woohoo!! My first g&b OC! He's a little shy but don't bully him too much pleassssse!!!

Forgot to mention... He uses a LOT of fancy words while I tried roleplaying with him. Not sure why but it fits hit character pretty well.

Picture for ref of what he looks like :


No changes for now since I'm out for vacation.
